reference: I took a fall today and landed hard on my behind. The lower back is hurting quite badly, but when I touch the hip bones and pelvis, they do not hurt. I have been putting ice and heat on it and have taken up to four Advil. It hurts like crazy; what should I do?
text: I took a fall today and landed hard on my behind. The lower back is hurting quite badly, but when I touch the hip bones and pelvis, they do not hurt. I have been putting ice and heat on it and have taken up to four Advil. It hurts like crazy. What should I do?
